lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: What? Oh, hello. I was deep in thought. Did you want me to show you the prices of weapons and armour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You seem a bit flustered.

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Sorry, I'm just deep in thought. I'm waiting for many deals to complete today.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What sort of things are you selling?

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Good old weapons and armour! My people - dwarves, you understand - are hoping I can trade with humans.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It looks like you've come to the right place for that.

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: I have indeed, my friend. Now, can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, show me the prices of weapons and armour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about the bank's auto-charging services?

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Hm? Oh, yes. If you don't want to charge your items yourself, you can have the bank attendant do it for you on withdrawal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do they know how many charges to add?

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: You can tell them how many you would like for each item. Or if you'd like, I can let them know a minimum threshold for all items.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think that's necessary, but thank you for offering.

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Alright then. Where was I...?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you alone.

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Thank you, I have much on my mind.

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Wow, that's cheap.

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Oh. That didn't sell so well.

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Hmmm. If I spend twenty thousand on that, then...

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Jackpot! I'm in the money now!

lines.speaker: Hofuthand (weapons and armour)
lines.text: Hahaha! Trading the likes of which I have never seen.
